theme: Engine bug fixes and leak fix
highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and resolves a native resource leak.
highlights_body: The Skia engine is updated with upstream chrome/m151 fixes, and a native handle leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData is resolved.

bullets.lead: Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: Cherry-picked bug fixes from Chrome milestone 151 are now bundled, bringing stability improvements from upstream Skia.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: Calling SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) with an SKRectI subset leaked a native handle. The handle is now released correctly.
